subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Praise thy Lord in the watches of the night and at the extremities of the day, sanctify thy countenance for thy Lord, and be thou among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمود ان احمد ربک فی آنا اللیل و اطراف النهار و قدس وجهک لربک و کن فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prophecy and fulfillment
